channel.title: Claude Developer Misery Index
channel.description: Real-time Claude AI reliability tracking — misery score, API status, and incident alerts. Updated every 15 minutes.

item.title: Misery Index: 2.5/10 — MINOR GRUMBLING
item.description: Score: 2.5/10 (MINOR GRUMBLING). Status: All Systems Operational. API: operational. Bluesky: 2 posts. Reddit: 8 posts.

item.title: [NONE] Sonnet 4.6 and Opus 4.6 elevated error rate
item.description: Status: resolved. Impact: none. Latest: Between 10:09 and 10:31 PDT, Sonnet 4.6 and Opus 4.6 experienced elevated error rates across most product surfaces.

item.title: [MAJOR] Elevated errors on requests to Claude Sonnet 4.6
item.description: Status: resolved. Impact: major. Latest: This incident has been resolved.

item.title: [MAJOR] Errors on the Claude.ai desktop application
item.description: Status: resolved. Impact: major. Latest: This incident has been resolved.

item.title: [MAJOR] Elevated errors on requests to Claude Opus 4.6
item.description: Status: resolved. Impact: major. Latest: This incident has been resolved.

item.title: [MAJOR] Elevated timeouts on requests to Claude Opus 4.6 and Sonnet 4.6
item.description: Status: resolved. Impact: major. Latest: We have identified an issue which resulted in elevated rates of timeouts when making requests to Claude Opus 4.6 and Sonnet 4.6 from 17:45 UTC on March 31 through 05:52 UTC on April 1. This issue has been resolved.
